title: 🤠 Keep your eyes peeled! What’s at the BOTTOM today might be at the TOP tomorrow.
description: In this week’s Country Buzz Top 10 (see below), we’ve rounded up all the hottest trends as usual—from Megan Moroney holding down the #1 spot, to Ryan Bingham (of Yellowstone fame) starting his climb at number 10.Having Ryan on the list is always a blast because he’s a personal favorite of mine (hint, hint!). That said, we can be pretty sure he’ll have a tough time climbing much higher. Our rankings take all the online buzz, throw it into one big bowl, and mix it up to see who’s creating the most TOTAL noise right now.
author: Honky Tonk Hansson

title: 🤠 Welcome to the NEW Country Music Gold Rush!
description: This week, my deep dive led me to a country crooner from Woodstock, Georgia: Mr. Kenny Whitmire. With a style reminiscent of Keith Whitley, he has "next big thing" written all over him. If he keeps up this momentum, expect to see him on the main list very soon. Remember where you heard about him first! This is where you find pure COUNTRY GOLD.
author: Honky Tonk Hansson

title: 🤠 Grammy Night Reshapes Country Buzz Top 10!
author: Honky Tonk Hansson

title: 🤠 Who is the BUZZiest right now?
author: Honky Tonk Hansson
